textFields.title: Meeting Glow Aura Card
textFields.message: A small confident choice can make the next moment feel easier.
textFields.outfit: Wear one clean line with a soft highlight near the face.
textFields.beauty: Keep the glow fresh and the finish light.
textFields.social: Lead with the simplest point and leave room for one thoughtful pause.
textFields.ritual: Take three slow breaths before stepping out.
textFields.avoid: Avoid over-planning the first ten minutes.
textFields.caption: Today I am carrying clear signal aura.
